additional_metadata.note: dbt Labs' first official community event in Manila, held to introduce the local community ahead of future meetups.

events.agenda: Happy hour with snacks and drinks, plus a dbt merch raffle; no formal talks.
events.event_description: dbt Labs' first official community event in Manila, welcoming analytics engineering professionals to meet the local community ahead of kicking off local meetup events.
events.location: Good Neighbor, Unit 9, Ground Floor, Verve One, Taguig, Metro Manila
events.raw_text:
Wed, May 22, 2024 · 5:15 PM to 7:30 PM PHT

dbt Labs' first official community event in Manila! We're excited to welcome analytics engineering professionals at this happy hour event to get to know the community in preparation of kicking off local meetup events!

excluded_events.reason: Generic dbt Labs community webinar cross-posted to this group, not Manila-specific
